aggro_runner_1.name: Runner
aggro_runner_1.textShort: Open enemy line: enemy hero loses 2 HP.

aggro_flanker_1.name: Flanker
aggro_flanker_1.textShort: If adjacent ally slot empty: +1 ATK.

aggro_scout_1.name: Scout
aggro_scout_1.textShort: On play: block enemy unit play here this turn.

aggro_rush_1.name: Rush
aggro_rush_1.textShort: Swap with first adjacent ally; fight that line.

aggro_pierce_strike_1.name: Pierce Strike
aggro_pierce_strike_1.textShort: Deal 1. Next combat hit ignores its armor.

aggro_quick_fix_1.name: Quick Fix
aggro_quick_fix_1.textShort: Target [ALLY]: heal 1, +1 ATK this turn. Draw on kill.

attrition_swarm_husk_1.name: Husk
attrition_swarm_husk_1.textShort: Combat death: deal 1 to opposed enemy.

attrition_swarm_leech_1.name: Leech
attrition_swarm_leech_1.textShort: Combat kill and survive: heal your hero 1.

attrition_swarm_abomination_1.name: Abomination
attrition_swarm_abomination_1.textShort: Combat death: both heroes lose 1 HP.

attrition_swarm_funeral_pyre_1.name: Funeral Pyre
attrition_swarm_funeral_pyre_1.textShort: First 2 [ALLY] combat deaths: deal 1 to opposed enemy.

attrition_swarm_infect_1.name: Infect
attrition_swarm_infect_1.textShort: Deal 1 to enemy. If it survives, opposed [ALLY] +1 ATK.

attrition_swarm_rise_again_1.name: Rise Again
attrition_swarm_rise_again_1.textShort: Revive the first discarded unit at 1 HP.

control_disruptor_1.name: Disruptor
control_disruptor_1.textShort: On play: cancel the next enemy effect this turn.

control_drone_1.name: Drone
control_drone_1.textShort: On death: enemy hero loses 1 HP.

control_swap_1.name: Swap
control_swap_1.textShort: Swap two units on one side.

control_pulse_wave_1.name: Pulse Wave
control_pulse_wave_1.textShort: Deal 1 to all enemies, ignoring ARM.

control_system_override_1.name: System Override
control_system_override_1.textShort: Target enemy attacks own hero next combat, then loses 1 HP.

swarm_spitter_1.name: Spitter
swarm_spitter_1.textShort: On play: deal 1 to opposing enemy.

swarm_spawn_1.name: Spawn
swarm_spawn_1.textShort: Summon 1/1 in first empty ally slot.

swarm_regrow_1.name: Regrow
swarm_regrow_1.textShort: Revive first discarded unit at 1 HP.

swarm_flood_1.name: Flood
swarm_flood_1.textShort: Fill up to 2 empty ally slots with temporary 1/1s.

tank_shieldbearer_1.name: Shieldbearer
tank_shieldbearer_1.textShort: Adjacent allies have +1 ARM in combat.

tank_guardian_1.name: Guardian
tank_guardian_1.textShort: Intercepts combat damage for adjacent ally.

tank_wall_1.name: Wall
tank_wall_1.textShort: Blocks line. This unit can’t attack.

tank_bruiser_1.name: Bruiser
tank_bruiser_1.textShort: When damaged and survives: +1 ATK this turn.

tank_stability_1.name: Stability
tank_stability_1.textShort: Allies can’t be moved/disabled this turn.

tank_last_stand_1.name: Last Stand
tank_last_stand_1.textShort: Allies can’t drop below 1 HP this turn.

wardens_stand_firm_1.name: Stand Firm
wardens_stand_firm_1.textShort: All [ALLY] can't be moved this turn.

common.swipeScroll: Swipe or mouse wheel to scroll

settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.subtitle: Preferences are saved locally
settings.languageHelp: Select display language for card and faction names

sections.heading: Goal
lines: Both heroes start at 12 HP.
Protect your hero and reduce the enemy hero to 0 HP.

sections.heading: Board / Lines
lines: The fight has 3 lines.
Play units into your line slots. The middle row is only for visuals.
If a unit attacks an open line, it hits the enemy hero.

sections.heading: Turn Flow
lines: At battle start, draw 4 cards and mulligan up to 2 cards once.
One side acts first, then initiative alternates each turn.
Each side gets 1 action or may pass.
After both sides act or pass, combat resolves automatically.
After combat, you draw 1 card, then the enemy draws 1 card.

sections.heading: Actions
lines: Cards have no mana, energy, or cost system.
Your action can play a unit, play an effect, use a targeted effect, swap friendly units, redeploy a unit, or pass.

sections.heading: Combat
lines: Combat happens line by line with no diagonal attacks.
Units fight opposing units in their line.
Open line attacks damage the opposing hero instead.
Both sides can deal damage during the same combat step.

sections.heading: Winning
lines: A battle can end when a hero is defeated.
If neither side can make meaningful progress, remaining hero HP decides the result.
If the turn limit is reached, remaining hero HP decides the result.
If remaining hero HP is tied, the battle is a draw.

tutorial.title: TUTORIAL
tutorial.subtitle: Battle basics
steps: Play units into lines to pressure the enemy hero.
Use effect cards and swaps to control combat timing.
End your turn after spending your action.
Reduce the enemy hero to 0 HP to win.
